name: Cheddar Baked Potato Sclices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine soup, paprika and pepper.
2. In a greased 2-quart oblong baking dish, arrange potatoes in overlapping rows. Sprinkle with cheese, spoon soup mixture over the cheese.
3. Cover with foil; bake at 400°F for 45 minutes. Remove foil and bake an additional 10 minutes or until potatoes are fork-tender.
